text.title: Research Framework Router
text.summary: Decision router that maps the current question to the smallest set of applicable frameworks and defines the artifact pipeline from idea to spec.

rule.statement: Pick the smallest subset of frameworks that answers the current decision — never run all eight at once. Decision modes: idea, validate, size, position, pivot.
rule.rationale: Running all eight frameworks on one idea is framework theater. Agents default to exhaustive execution; the router constraint prevents this and keeps output actionable.

list.item: idea mode: 7Ps + Paul Graham questions + niche evaluation
validate mode: validation criteria + JTBD + problem interviews
position mode: Value Proposition Canvas + competitor analysis + JTBD
pivot mode: niche evaluation + TAM/SAM/SOM + Value Proposition Canvas

rule.statement: Lock the ICP in one sentence before any framework runs; reuse that sentence verbatim across all artifacts.
rule.rationale: Frameworks produce inconsistent outputs when each run re-infers a slightly different ICP. One locked sentence prevents drift and enables downstream SDD agents to ingest artifacts directly.

list.item: 1. Discovery: apply 7Ps + Paul Graham in parallel; output idea-candidates.md (10-20 raw ideas)
2. Triage: score each candidate on the 50-point niche matrix; cull anything below 30
3. Validation: pick top 3, run validation criteria with primary research (5+ interviews, Google Trends, Reddit)
4. Jobs: write JTBD statements (functional + emotional + social) for the survivor
5. Sizing: TAM/SAM/SOM via three-method triangulation; flag spread > 2x; do not average
6. Competition: fill 6-dimension table (features, pricing, positioning, tech, feedback, GTM)
7. Positioning: Value Proposition Canvas; check pain-relievers cover top-3 pains
8. Handoff: write executive-summary.md linking all artifacts; pass to faion-sdd for spec.md

rule.statement: Cite a URL with retrieval date on every external number. LLM-only cells are explicitly tagged "estimate".
rule.rationale: LLMs hallucinate framework cells fluently. Without a citation requirement the niche matrix becomes confidently wrong. The "estimate" tag signals which numbers need validation before acting on them.

rule.statement: Require two independent scorers (or two agent runs) for niche scoring; average only if within 2 points on each criterion.
rule.rationale: Identical inputs to two agent runs produce 15+ point spread. Two runs with averaged scores are more reliable than one run treated as ground truth.

list.item: faion-research-agent: orchestrator, 9 modes (ideas, niche, market, competitors, pricing, personas, pains, validate, names)
faion-market-researcher-agent: owns sizing, competitor table, pricing, trend analysis frameworks
faion-user-researcher-agent: owns JTBD, VPC customer side, pains, personas, validation interviews
faion-domain-checker-agent: pairs with positioning output when a name shortlist is generated

text.reference: Shell router that prints the framework subset for a given decision mode.
